deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, $152,000 cash. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo. Cleared and funded Apr 26, closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joy. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel and Chelsey Bongiovi. Confirm commission.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Released delivered to Chicago Title.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo - lien holder willing to work with us

deals.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Current offer dead - no earnest money. Price adjustment needed. Steve clearing property.
deals.next: Verify pricing from truck folder. Follow up with Steve once clearing complete. Lead with net after close on next offer.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed - verify pricing from folder in truck
Steve sent new photos - green screen content opportunity for social
Clearing complete - Steve finished job and sent photos

deals.title: 181 CR 7751 - Devine REO
deals.notes: Bank-owned property needing work. HouzzPro estimate $54,877. Work started May 9 with dumpsters. Bryce contact has military wife - VA buyer opportunity.
deals.next: Work is active and moving. Connect Bryce with buyer info. Finalize scope with Priority Bank once all quotes confirmed.

logs.m: On-site visit - met Bryce (dumpster contractor). His wife is active military, recently moved from Ohio, renting, looking to buy. VA opportunity.
Work officially starting - dumpsters dropped this weekend
Met Matt Toney in office. Connected directly with Jerry Sadler. Work target next Monday.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr - Devine
deals.notes: Underwater $93K-$143K. Double-carrying mortgage + apartment rent. Vacant 6 months. Market value $350K-$400K, payoff ~$493K. Three paths identified.
deals.next: Call broker first on short sale protocol. Then present three paths to Matt and Chandler. Get decision on which option they want to pursue.

logs.m: Stopped by property - put mail in house. Landscaper stopping by to quote yard work tomorrow.
Showing by outside agent at 2pm. Lawn care referrals received.
CMA complete - realistic market value $350K-$400K. Underwater by $93K-$143K.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path - San Antonio
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA listed $259,900. Relocated to NC, June deadline. Listing agreement signed. Photos in. Going live Wednesday May 13.
deals.next: Neighborhood canvassing Tuesday May 12. Drop sign and lockbox. Launch MLS May 13.

logs.m: Listing agreement signed. Photos received from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13.
Pre-inspection scheduled 8:30 AM with Coach Ricky Smith. Review findings and contract signature at 10 AM.
Listing consultation on-site at 11am. Positive response. Foundation crack discussed. Payoff discrepancy flagged.

deals.title: 00 Borregas - Elmendorf
deals.notes: Land/acreage development opportunity. Isaac interested in mobile home development - ~$150K offer. Title defect found - correction deed needed.
deals.next: Pull listing agreement to check signatures. Title attorney working on correction deed. Confirm sisters decision on extension.

logs.m: Jennifer Ball took initiative - hired attorney Van Hutchins. Title defect confirmed in Deed #20100079485. Correction deed in progress.
Isaac offered ~$150K for mobile home development project. Sisters enthusiastic. Discuss formal offer once details confirmed.
Showing occurred - updated sisters on property interest

deals.title: Moran - New Construction Buyer
deals.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month P+I. New home sales reps pulling inventory. Builder rate buydowns are the angle.
deals.next: Milagros signs buyer rep. Follow up on MI Homes option from Frank. Contact Jimbo on rental details for 8527 Green Bliss.

logs.m: Intro email sent to Milagros. MI Homes found option keeping payments under $1,200/month.
Buyer rep agreement signed by Milagros

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss - Rental
deals.notes: 1,535 sqft 3BR/2BA new construction (2025). Recommended rent $1,595/month. Direct comp on same street asking same price. WiFi and W/D included.
deals.next: Waiting on Jimbo responses. Send Skyslope listing agreement packet. Confirm rental price and HOA responsibility. Discuss property management.

logs.m: Intro email sent to Jimbo with CMA analysis and market breakdown for 78222 Grace Gardens area
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. Son made flyers. Ready to move forward.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction with rate buydowns and incentives. Open to new construction when Chris raised it. Pre-approval status unknown with Zach Schaphorst.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Identify new construction builders with no HOA. Set up new home search platform.

logs.m: Text from Mike - rental property being sold. Rents going up. Pivoting to new construction entirely.
Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing while pre-approval sorts out

leads.title: Kurt - 9815 Conbes
leads.detail: Neighbor around the corner from 9815 Conbes. Listing under contract at $275,000. Kurt wants intel on offers and deal details. Buyer or seller - needs clarification.
leads.next: Call Kurt to clarify his situation. Is he buying, selling, or both? Get his contact details and understand his real estate needs.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection - grief to healing to plants story. Connected through garden share group. Potential content collaboration. Real estate potential trust-based long-term.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story for content. Keep nurturing relationship, no rush on real estate.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor Lead
leads.detail: Investor - buy box unknown. Met recently. Full intake still needed. Likely Schertz area based on context.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call - understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold). Add to Bold Trail. Connect on matching deals.

leads.title: Isaac Linares - Linares Capital LLC
leads.detail: Mobile home seller, small acreage specialist. First referral delivered - 10023 Mill Path listing. Partnership model: Isaac sends traditional home leads, Chris returns land/acreage buyers. Development interest in Borregas property.
leads.next: Thank Isaac personally on Mill Path. Follow up on Borregas mobile home project timeline. Build ongoing referral system with Isaac for off-market deals and bulk lots.

logs.m: Lunch meeting with Isaac and partner Adam. Discussed off-market deals, bulk lots, and combined forces model.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/month rent. Military retirement income plus daughters disability checks (live with her). Between jobs but motivated. Actively fixing credit. VA loan eligible - zero down.
leads.next: Follow up tomorrow - check in on sick grandkid first. Connect with VA-approved lender. Qualify on timeline, budget, target area.

logs.m: Spoke today - sick grandkid, not right time. Warm conversation. Following up tomorrow.
Confirmed military retirement and daughters disability income. Follow-up text sent on VA benefits.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: Age 18, finishing senior year. Interested in getting into real estate. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer). Worth conversation about licensing and eXp opportunity.
leads.next: Get Jahsia contact info from Julie. Reach out for intro call. Explain licensing path and eXp agent opportunity.

leads.title: Armando - Employee Buyer
leads.detail: Employee buyer program - David Roth referral. Budget $50,000 down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Open to options from multiple builders. Not locked to specific neighborhood.
leads.next: Get Armando contact from David Roth. Pull new construction options from DR Horton, MI Homes, Lennar fitting budget. Register as buyer agent before first builder visit.

leads.title: Colton & Abby Brown
leads.detail: Prior clients who purchased Moore TX home with VA renovation loan. Going through divorce - need to finish renovation and sell. Colton looking for work - consider for 181 CR 7751 contractor job.
leads.next: Reach out to Colton - confirm listing timeline and property status. Get property details. Check if Moore TX needs referral agent. Run CMA. Offer him 181 CR 7751 job.

priorities.title: 340 Sollock Dr Critical Decision
priorities.notes: Underwater $93K-$143K, double-carrying costs, vacant 6 months. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash. Broker guidance first, then seller conversation.

Get sellers decision on which path they have appetite for

followUps.text: Drop sign and lockbox at property Tuesday
